series_metadata.series_description: Payment requests, applications, correspondence from parents, students and veterans'''''''' offices and board meeting minutes related to this program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain correspondence and applications in office 5 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain student names, Social Security Numbers and award amounts for 5 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy. Board minutes shall be scanned and retained permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
